items.html: And do not wonder how it is that the great Mochin were made through the Zivug [coupling] of AVI [Aba ve Ima], while the discernment of "three comprised in three" was made through the Zivug of AA [Arich Anpin] himself, who is above them. The matter is that the existence and the first being — which are the six ends [VAK] — are the essential; therefore it was made by AA, for by his power the whole existence of Atzilut is made, and on him they all hang, and they clothe him, as is known. But the Mochin, which are an addition of goodness, come through AVI, for it is not the root of the existence of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva].
